name: P&L Analyzer
shortDescription: Enterprise Profit & Loss analysis platform with hierarchical planning and budget tracking.
description: Enterprise Profit & Loss Analysis Platform built with TypeScript, Express 5, React 19, Prisma and PostgreSQL. Supports hierarchical planning structures and budget vs. actual tracking.

name: EscrowService
shortDescription: Multi-signature escrow platform for secure asset custody and transfers on the Canton Network.
description: Multi-signature escrow platform for secure asset custody and transfers. Integrates with the Canton Network (DAML). Built with TypeScript, Express, PostgreSQL and React/Vite frontend.
otherDetails: Workspace: ~/Desktop/APPs/escrowservice. Canton Network integration. Railway: EscrowSendTrafficSvc-Production

name: Process & Controls
shortDescription: Compliance and process controls management application.
description: React + TypeScript application for managing process controls and compliance workflows.

name: Multi-Tenant Foundation
shortDescription: Multi-tenant platform for deploying intelligent agents with data sources and MCP integrations.
description: Multi-tenant platform for creating intelligent agents with data sources, MCP integrations, and advanced deployments. Built with TypeScript, Express 5, React 19, Vite 7, Prisma 7, PostgreSQL with pgvector.

name: Bobby
shortDescription: Next.js application.
description: Next.js + React + TypeScript application.

name: AgentHub
shortDescription: Lightweight embeddable AI chat product powered by Claude with MCP tool hub.
description: Lightweight embeddable AI agent hub powered by Claude with MCP tool hub for BigQuery datasets. Built with TypeScript, Express, React, Vite, PostgreSQL with pgvector, Drizzle ORM.

name: AgentHub SaaS
shortDescription: B2B platform for Expert AI Assistants with multi-model support, custom domains, and widget deployment.
description: B2B platform (MoluAbi) for creating intelligent Expert AI Assistants with multiple data sources, MCP integrations, multi-model AI support (Claude, GPT-4o, Grok), widget deployment, custom domain mapping, and usage tracking/billing. Supports Electron desktop widget.
otherDetails: Custom domain mapping support (e.g. oregpt.ai). Desktop Electron widget. Dev: https://agenthub-dev.up.railway.app

name: AgenticLedger Platform
shortDescription: App marketplace and agent platform — browse, register, and manage AI-powered apps.
description: AgenticLedger Platform — app marketplace, app catalog, MCP catalog, org management, and access control. Built with TypeScript, Express, React, Vite, PostgreSQL.

name: AgenticLedger Prod
shortDescription: Production Expert AI Assistants platform — multi-model, custom domains, enterprise-grade.
description: Production version of the MoluAbi Expert AI Assistants platform. Multi-model AI (Claude, GPT-4o, Grok), custom domains, desktop widget, website widgets, agent training, usage tracking, BigQuery integration, MCP servers. Supports GCP Cloud Run and Docker.
otherDetails: Deploy: GCP Cloud Run / Docker. Custom domain support (oregpt.ai). Workspace: ~/Desktop/APPs/agenticledger-prod

name: AgentInABox Platform Admin
shortDescription: Admin dashboard for the AgentInABox multi-tenant agent platform.
description: Platform administration interface for the AgentInABox core product. Manages tenants, agents, configurations and deployments across the multi-tenant agent platform.

name: Enterprise Wallet Manager
shortDescription: Enterprise-grade digital wallet management platform with balance explorer.
description: Enterprise digital wallet management platform. Includes wallet manager frontend, backend API, balance explorer, and dev/beta/production environments. Custom domains: walletmanager.agenticledger.ai and balanceexplorer.agenticledger.ai.

name: Flux Analyzer
shortDescription: Financial flux analysis platform deployed on Railway.
description: Flux analysis application for financial data. Deployed on Railway with custom domain.

name: Agentic Portal
shortDescription: Agent portal and gateway for AgenticLedger services.
description: Agentic Portal — public-facing portal and gateway for AgenticLedger agent services. Deployed on Railway with custom domain.

name: FRExplorer
shortDescription: Wallet balance and transaction explorer for AgenticLedger financial rails.
description: FRExplorer — blockchain/financial rail explorer for querying wallet balances and transactions. Deployed on Railway with custom domain.

name: Finance MCPs Hub
shortDescription: Production MCP server hub for 40+ finance integrations — QuickBooks, Stripe, Ramp, Mercury, and more.
description: Production MCP server hub hosting 40+ finance-specific MCP servers: QuickBooks, Stripe, Ramp, Mercury, Bill.com, NetSuite, Xero, Plaid, Brex, Gusto, Paypal, Fireblocks, Chargebee, Avalara, Expensify, and many more. Each MCP exposed as an HTTP endpoint under financemcps.agenticledger.ai.
otherDetails: 40+ individual MCP servers each with their own custom domain (e.g. qbomcp.agenticledger.ai, stripemcp.agenticledger.ai, etc.)

name: Finance Is Cooked Platform
shortDescription: Platform for the Finance Is Cooked weekly show about AI disrupting finance & accounting.
description: Full platform for the Finance Is Cooked weekly show. Includes content management, episode archive, show companion features, and community tools. Deployed at financeiscooked.com.

name: AgentHub Admin
shortDescription: Admin portal for managing the AgentHub SaaS platform tenants and configurations.
description: Internal admin portal for the AgentHub / MoluAbi SaaS platform. Manages tenants, billing, agent configurations, and platform operations.

name: Catalyx Wallet Manager
shortDescription: Wallet management platform for Catalyx digital assets.
description: Catalyx Wallet Manager — digital asset wallet management platform. Includes beta and production environments on Railway.

name: Compliance App
shortDescription: Hierarchical compliance management system for tracking regulatory requirements and audit cycles.
description: Compliance management application for tracking regulatory requirements, managing audit periods, monitoring compliance status across hierarchical structures. Includes issue logging, evidence document management, and audit cycle tracking.

name: AI Project Manager
shortDescription: AI-powered project management platform for tracking tasks, milestones, and team progress.
description: AI-powered project management platform built by AgenticLedger. Tracks tasks, milestones, and team progress with AI assistance. Deployed on Railway with custom domain.

name: Finney Builder
shortDescription: AI-powered app builder — describe an app and Finney builds and deploys it instantly.
description: Finney Builder is an AI-powered application builder. Describe what you want to build and Finney generates, deploys, and hosts the app automatically. Built on Railway with custom domain finney.finance.
